media_storage.title: Media Storage
media_storage.description: Choose where to save motion clips and snapshots. Select 'Disabled' for no archival.

progress.push_approval: A push notification has been sent to your phone. Approve it in the Arlo app...

error.push_timeout: Push approval timed out. Try again.
error.rate_limited: Arlo is rate-limiting requests. Wait a few hours and try again.

abort.rate_limited: Arlo is rate-limiting requests. Wait a few hours and try again.
